text:
Maita (マイタ, Maita) is a prizefighter in the Heavens Arena. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 6, Chapter 45 

Appearance

Maita is a large, bulky man with a bald head, narrow eyes, and bushy eyebrows.

Plot

Heavens Arena arc

Maita makes a brief appearance on the 50th floor when he is scheduled to fight against Chibaba. They're weak in Killua's opinion. 

Battles

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Manga and Anime Differences

Maita doesn't appear or is mentioned in the 2011 anime series adaptation.
